title: Ultra Blood Moon
description: Blood Moon turns ordinary nights into survival events with stronger mob variants and unique lunar events, pushing players toward inevitable, high-stakes encounters.
body:
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ade469a556b37c43f9abe4e74e74adfa95f24062.png)

![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6963e79b5cad6a7a1bb1b38c9f7683e50f206676.png)
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c18e139f00ee0a13c154eac7e391d7daf56766e_0.webp)

Nights.. are no longer safe.

Ultra Blood Moon transforms standard Minecraft nights into survival events driven by a dynamic lunar system.

Instead of fixed or predictable events, each night is influenced by a probability-based system that determines whether a special moon will occur. If no event happens, the chance increases over time through a built-in pity system, ensuring that extended periods of normal nights eventually lead to a high-risk event. When a Blood Moon occurs, mobs can spawn as special variants with unique abilities and modified attributes.

These variants may have increased health, improved damage, or distinct behaviors that force players to adapt in real time.
Also, during active moon events, players are unable to sleep, preventing them from skipping the night and to ensure that the event must be faced directly.

Type **/bloodmoon chance** to view the current blood moon chance. 
For admins, type **/bm help** to get all admin commands.

![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6963e79b5cad6a7a1bb1b38c9f7683e50f206676.png)
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5800b5aacca6b4bb39468a604a32ef282cb11888_0.webp)

### **Blood Moon**
- **Zombie** - Enhanced durability. Frequently spawns equipped with weapons and armor.
- **Zombie Brute** - Massive and dangerous. High health, wields an iron axe, but trades speed for power.
- **Face Zombie** - Steals vitality from players. Gains lifesteal with every successful hit.
  
### **Hallowed Moon**
- **Spooky Skeleton** - Inflicts stacking slowness. At maximum stacks, applies blindness.
- **Spooky Archer** - Increased survivability and more threatening ranged combat.
- **Spook** - Invisible predator. Reveals itself only near soul-based light or when players carry one.
  
### **Arcane Moon**
- **Arcane Illusioner** - Enhanced illusionist with increased health and battlefield pressure.
- **Arcane Evoker** - High-health variant, but cannot summon vexes.

![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6963e79b5cad6a7a1bb1b38c9f7683e50f206676.png)
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43aa484489b69d9c3062db759ed7e79f35b35b0d.png)

- **Dynamic Moon System** - Nights are no longer predictable; events occur based on probability. Each night without an event increases the chance of one occurring
Once triggered, the chance resets.
- **Mob Variants** - Special mobs with unique abilities, attributes, and behaviors
- **Bossbars** - Displays active moon score
- **Fully Configurable** - Control everything in your will.

![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6963e79b5cad6a7a1bb1b38c9f7683e50f206676.png)
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212ab8d38fca8f5ea920339e46fc6bbb2efeeb38.png)
- **Tested on:** Paper
- **Supports** Purpur, Spigot, Bukkit
